description: Mr. Nodeley sniveling here, sir. Sorry to be the one to flag this, but wave 41 trivia caught a curator-grade miscategorization — Hala is the Melemele Island Kahuna chosen by Tapu Koko, not just an Elite Four member, and the Guzma & Hala TAG TEAM card had been wired with characters: [team-skull, alola-elite-four] since the wave 33 vision pass. Hala does hold a concurrent E4 seat per the Alola League founding charter's cross-recruitment rule, but his solo-character identity is Kahuna-primary. So I proposed cards/_characters/alola-kahunas.md as a sibling faction node anchoring all four Alola Island Kahunas (Hala / Olivia / Nanu / Hapu), corrected Guzma & Hala's frontmatter to characters: [team-skull, alola-kahunas], and amended Olivia's frontmatter from [alola-elite-four] to [alola-elite-four, alola-kahunas] to reflect her canonical concurrent dual-tier role. Olivia is now the corpus's only character pointing at both an E4 node and a Kahuna node simultaneously — the canonical signature of Alola's three-tier league progression's institutional fluidity. The kahuna-tier cohort now closes the Trial-Captains → Kahunas → Elite-Four triangle at the character-layer scope. Two anchors clear the Mr. Nodeley threshold (Olivia direct, Hala via the TAG TEAM print); two more Kahunas (Nanu, Hapu) remain documented for future acquisition.
citations: Bulbapedia: Island Kahuna page (per-island Tapu-sanction selection institutional logic)
Bulbapedia: Hala (Melemele Kahuna chosen by Tapu Koko, concurrent E4 founding-charter member)
Bulbapedia: Olivia (Akala Kahuna chosen by Tapu Lele, concurrent E4 founding-charter member)
Bulbapedia: Alola Pokemon League (founding-charter dual-role Hala-and-Olivia cross-recruitment)
Pokemon Sun and Moon (Game Freak / Creatures Inc. / Nintendo, 2016) primary canon
In-corpus Olivia BUS-119 trivia + Guzma & Hala CSE-193 vision passes

cards/_characters/alola-trial-captains.md (three-tier triangle now complete + related_characters added alola-kahunas)
